backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Show and DJ types with full CRUD operations, including creating/retrieving shows and DJs, assigning DJs to shows, and fetching the current show.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming the Live365 iframe player is embedded in the OnAirNow component with responsive centering, mapped to test REQ-14.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of all frontend source files to short descriptions, serving as a reference index for the project's component and page structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (colors, sidebar, charts, radius).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'The Country Channel' that mounts the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with public routes (Home, Shows, DJs) under Layout and admin routes (Dashboard, ManageShows, ManageDJs) under AdminLayout.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Provides the admin panel shell with a responsive sidebar navigation (Dashboard, Shows, DJs), a top header bar, and an Outlet for nested admin routes.
frontend/src/components/admin/DJFormModa: A dialog modal for creating a new DJ (name, bio, photo URL) or viewing an existing DJ's details; editing existing DJs is not supported by the backend.
frontend/src/components/admin/ShowFormMo: A dialog modal for creating a new radio show or editing an existing show's DJ assignment, with form validation and fields for title, description, schedule, and DJ selection.
frontend/src/components/DJCard.tsx: Reusable card displaying a DJ's avatar, name, bio, and associated shows with country-themed amber styling.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick nav links, live status indicator, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Public layout wrapper composing Navigation, a page Outlet, and Footer for all public-facing pages.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with branding, nav links, an admin link, and a pulsing 'On Air' indicator (with show title) that appears on both desktop and mobile when a show is live.
frontend/src/components/OnAirNow.tsx: Displays a banner showing the currently on-air radio show with DJ info, schedule, and an animated 'On Air' badge, or a placeholder message if nothing is airing.
frontend/src/components/ShowCard.tsx: Renders a styled card for a single radio show displaying its title, description, schedule day/time, and assigned DJ name.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and exposing status flags to consumers.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating shows and DJs via the backend actor, including queries for all shows, all DJs, current show, and mutations for creating/assigning shows and creating DJs.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining CSS custom properties for a warm country-themed light and dark color scheme, and setting base typography styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard displaying stat cards for total shows, DJs, and assigned shows, plus a recent shows list with links to management pages.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageDJs.tsx: Admin page for managing DJs, displaying them in a grid with avatars and bios, and providing add/edit functionality via a DJFormModal.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ManageShows.tsx: Admin page for managing radio shows, displaying a table of shows with edit actions and an add button that opens a ShowFormModal for creating or editing shows.
frontend/src/pages/DJs.tsx: Public DJs page that fetches and displays all DJs in a responsive grid using DJCard components, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page featuring a hero banner with a live listen button, an on-air-now section, and previews of featured shows and DJs with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/Shows.tsx: Public Shows page that fetches and displays all shows in a responsive grid using ShowCard components, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, color tokens (amber, tan, wood-dark, admin palette), border radius, shadows, and animations for the Country Channel theme.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing The Country Channel radio station app, tracking implemented features (homepage, shows/DJs pages, admin dashboard, CRUD interfaces, theming) at schema version 1.0.0.
